CustomField.description: Controls whether this action runs during cascading triggers (when a different object's trigger causes this object's trigger to fire). When false, the action only runs when the trigger is initiated directly by the originating DML. Defaults to true (cascading allowed).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When unchecked, this action is skipped if the trigger was caused by another object's trigger (cascading). Only runs on direct DML operations.
CustomField.label: Allow Non Self-Initiated
